name: Priority Road
meaning: You are on a priority road. Traffic from side roads must yield.
meaning_fr: Vous êtes sur une route prioritaire. Le trafic des routes secondaires doit céder le passage.

name: Give Way
meaning: Yield to traffic on the intersecting road.
meaning_fr: Cédez le passage au trafic de la route transversale.

name: Stop
meaning: Come to a complete stop before proceeding.

name: No Entry
meaning: Entry is prohibited for all vehicles in this direction.
meaning_fr: L'entrée est interdite à tous les véhicules dans cette direction.

name: Road Work
meaning: Road works ahead. Slow down and proceed with caution.
meaning_fr: Travaux en cours. Ralentissez et procédez avec prudence.

name: Traffic Lights Ahead
meaning: Traffic lights ahead. Be prepared to stop.
meaning_fr: Feux de signalisation devant. Préparez-vous à vous arrêter.

name: Pedestrian Crossing
meaning: Pedestrian crossing ahead. Yield to pedestrians.
meaning_fr: Passage piétons devant. Cédez le passage aux piétons.

name: Roundabout
meaning: Roundabout ahead. Yield to traffic already in the roundabout.
meaning_fr: Rond-point devant. Cédez le passage au trafic déjà engagé.

name: No Parking
meaning: Parking is prohibited in this area.
meaning_fr: Le stationnement est interdit dans cette zone.
